title: Everything You Need to Know About PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in a country restricted by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're likely frustrated trying to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and software. You've probably wasted hours setting up and tearing down payment systems, only to find that buyers can't pay with their preferred crypto. It's time to break free from these limitations with Unchained Commerce's automated digital product delivery solution, powered by NOWPayments. In this post, we'll explore everything you need to know about PDF receipt generation for your crypto store, so you can focus on creating and selling your products, not fighting payment gateways.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery with PDF receipt generation is a game-changer for creators in restricted countries. It allows you to sell digital products without relying on legacy payment systems, which often impose geographical restrictions, KYC requirements, or other hurdles. With this technology, you can create a seamless payment experience for your buyers, who can pay with their preferred cryptocurrencies, and instantly receive a PDF receipt confirming their purchase. This not only boosts trust and satisfaction but also simplifies order management and fulfillment.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The automated digital product delivery solution uses a webhook-driven delivery pipeline, which is triggered when a buyer makes a payment through NOWPayments. This pipeline consists of several components, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification, automated delivery, and PDF receipt generation, while Web3 Wallet Connect facilitates frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation. The Admin Dashboard provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easy to monitor and optimize your sales process.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is designed specifically for digital creators in restricted countries, who often struggle to find payment systems that accommodate their needs. It's also ideal for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores, who require a seamless and automated payment experience for their buyers. With Unchained Commerce's solution, you can focus on creating high-quality digital products and building your business, without worrying about payment gateways and technical hurdles.
Automated digital product delivery with PDF receipt generation is a must-have for digital creators in restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The automated digital product delivery solution consists of several key components, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification, automated delivery, and PDF receipt generation, while Web3 Wallet Connect provides frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation. The Admin Dashboard offers transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easy to monitor and optimize your sales process. By integrating these components, you can create a seamless and automated payment experience for your buyers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using automated digital product delivery with PDF receipt generation, you'll need to set up the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. You can start by visiting the Unchained Commerce website and selecting the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to get started. Next, integrate your payment gateway, such as NOWPayments, and configure your webhook settings to trigger automated delivery. Finally, test your solution with a sample digital product and verify that PDF receipts are generated correctly. By following these steps, you can create a seamless and automated payment experience for your buyers and start selling digital products with confidence.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital delivery works through a webhook — an HTTP notification that NOWPayments sends to your Core Shop Engine endpoint when a payment confirms on-chain. The engine receives the webhook, reads the payment amount and transaction hash from the payload, verifies the amount matches the order total, confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain directly, then generates a PDF receipt and sends a delivery email with a time-limited download link to the buyer's email address. The entire sequence runs server-side with no user interface and no manual steps. It completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation in almost all cases. If any step fails, the Admin Dashboard flags the order for manual review so nothing slips through.
The webhook-driven delivery pipeline is the key to seamless and automated payment experiences.

You can find more information about Web3 Wallet Connect on the Unchained Commerce website, and start building your crypto-native digital product store today.
Your Action Checklist

To set up automated digital product delivery with PDF receipt generation, follow these steps: 1) Visit the Unchained Commerce website and select the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to get started. 2) Integrate your payment gateway, such as NOWPayments, and configure your webhook settings to trigger automated delivery. 3) Configure your Admin Dashboard to display transaction logs and order management. 4) Test your solution with a sample digital product and verify that PDF receipts are generated correctly. 5) Launch your digital product store and start selling with confidence.
Unchained Commerce's solution is designed specifically for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores.
